title: Guardianship Assistance - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Guardianship Assistance 6 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF IMPACT NW IMPACT NW SENIOR GAP SENIOR GUARDIANSHIP ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides court-appointed guardianship and conservatorship, trustee, care management, pre-planning (with Power of Attorney and Healthcare Representative) and executor of estate services for older adults. Services are by appointment only. Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 294-7445 Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE OFFICE OF THE LONG-TERM CARE OMBUDSMAN OREGON PUBLIC GUARDIAN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Serves as court-appointed, alternate decision makers for adults incapable of making some or most of the decisions necessary for their basic care and safety. The program is a last resort and is only used when there is no less restrictive option available for addressing a serious safety risk and no eligible alternative guardian is available. 830 D Street NE Salem, OR 973011212 Eligibility: Individualas who fall into one of the following three priorities: -Individuals at imminent or ongoing chronic risk of serious harm or death due to their circumstances and incapacity -Individuals who are momentarily safe, but are currently held in a medical or psychiatric hospital and are unable to be safely discharged without the oversight of a guardian -Individuals currently living in an independent living situation (own home or rental) who will not be able to safely maintain in that living situation on their own, but could continue to do so safely with guardian oversight Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 378-6848 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SENIOR CITIZENS COUNCIL OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY GUARDIANSHIP/CONSERVATORSHIP PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides guardianship, conservatorship, family support, case management, and advocacy services through the following programs: Guardianship/Conservatorship Program: Provides guardianship and conservatorship services for those who are not capable of making appropriate decisions about their well-being and who have no family or friends willing or able to accept such responsibilities. If all other appropriate alternatives have been tried, agency can serve as the Guardian and/or Conservator for the person. Guardianship Diversion Program: Helps ensure that all possible alternatives are explored before the step of adjudication is taken. Program offers client assessment, personal support and encouragement to clients and/or families, short-term counseling, placement counseling, case monitoring, outreach, community education about alternatives to guardianship, and information/referral to community resources. 812 7th Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Age 60 and older, and some adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 657-1366 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST ANDREW LEGAL CLINIC ST ANDREW LEGAL CLINIC HILLSBORO FAMILY LAW SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal representation and advice for people with family law problems such as adoption, child custody and support, divorce, paternity, and visitation issues. 232 NE Lincoln Street Suite H Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 281-1500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST ANDREW LEGAL CLINIC ST ANDREW LEGAL CLINIC PORTLAND FAMILY LAW SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal representation and advice for people with family law problems such as adoption, child custody and support, divorce, paternity, and visitation issues. 2950 SE Stark Street Suite 200 Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 281-1500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE COMMONS LAW CENTER GUARDIANSHIP AND CONSERVATORSHIP HELP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with understanding and starting guardianship or conservatorship processes, such as document drafting and filing, legal coaching, negotiation, and courtroom advocacy. PO Box 14280 Portland, OR 97293 Eligibility: Income must be at or below 400% federal poverty level (FPL) Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 850-0811 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE OFFICE OF THE LONG-TERM CARE OMBUDSMAN OREGON PUBLIC GUARDIAN SENIOR CITIZENS COUNCIL OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY GUARDIANSHIP/CONSERVATORSHIP PROGRAMS ST ANDREW LEGAL CLINIC FAMILY LAW SERVICES ST ANDREW LEGAL CLINIC FAMILY LAW SERVICES THE COMMONS LAW CENTER GUARDIANSHIP AND CONSERVATORSHIP HELP
